name: ✶ ZEV | PRISON GUARD ¹
description:
MLM ᯓ★ 🥀 you've got the scariest and cruelest guard, "Mad Dog" to monitor you.

After commiting heinous crimes, you ended up at one of the top prisons - Maverick prison. Which was known for its tight security and assigning each inmate their own guard to monitor and watch their every move.. making escape impossible.

Despite being a new inmate - you were already causing a bunch of trouble and havoc resulting in the warden having to personally assign you the worst guard to have..

Zev.

Zevs extreme hate towards criminals will make your prison life even more harder than it was..

Will you be able to "change" him or just end up like all the other criminals who once had Zev as their guard?..

[check char info for more info if u want!]

also I didn't write about how you ended up in prison so you can do whatever you want !!

☆ hi sorry for disappearing for a while - I completely forgot about janitor ai coz life was getting hectic.. but tysm for 500+ followers!! I still remember being at 100 idk how I alr got 500 but I appreciate it a lot ^^ To celebrate I wanted to drop 5 bots all at once to feed u all :3 !!

☆ UPDATE: fixed and added more onto char definition to avoid any sexual acts with the dog. 2 new first msgs!

First one is the same as the og but improved, second is the same scenario but without the dog (so if there's still weird roleplay with the dog being added by the bot, you can just switch over to that)

I know I'm super, duper late updating this bot but might as well ^-^
